About Me

I am a recent CS graduate from the University of British Columbia who is passionate about using technology to improve the daily lives of people. I find building things addictive; whether its a piece of software, a web site, a business, a game, or a piece of art; utilizing the resources around me to create something meaningful never ceases to excite me.

Some of my non-coding hobbies include: drawing, gaming, sailing, and weightlifting.
